case_title: OBINNA U UGORJI VS. DOES 1 TO 50, INCLUSIVE

docket_entries.description: DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF OBINNA UGORJI'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO SERVE DEPOSITION SUBPOENAS PRIOR TO SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. MOVING PARTY TO CONSIDER FILING PETITION PURSUANT TO CCP 2035.010. THE COURT WILL PREPARE AN ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM STEVEN STEIN, CLERK K. LIU, NOT REPORTED. (D32/JPT)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-17-2019 Continued To Jan-07-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Serve Deposition Subpoenas Prior To Service Of Summons And Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-01-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty Richard M. Lieberman of Law Offices of Richard Lieberman 415-929-3197. / No other appearances.

Hearing Held - The Court rulings PLAINTIFF OBINNA UGORJI's Motion For Leave To Serve Deposition Subpoenas Prior To Service Of Summons And Complaint is denied without prejudice. Moving party to consider filing petition pursuant to CCP 2035.010. The Court will prepare an order. Judge Pro Tem Steven Stein, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D32/JPT)
